title: spathoglottis malabarica
intro: Spathoglottis malabarica is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spathoglottis malabarica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically dried and used to make decoctions, infusions, or powders for medicinal purposes.
